---
title: "Megalithic tombs in western and northern Neolithic Europe were linked to a kindred society"
date: 2019-05-07
author:  ["Federico Sánchez Quinto", "Helena Malmström, Magdalena Fraser", "Mattias Jakobsson"]
publication: "PNAS, **116**, _9469-9474_ (2019)."
categories: ["mammoth"]
url_source: https://www.pnas.org/doi/full/10.1073/pnas.1818037116
url_preprint: 
url_pdf: 
journ: "PNAS"
volumen: 116
issue: 11 # Numero
page: 9469-9474
year: 2019
pub_number: 1
image: "../cover/01_pnas_Neolithic.png"
---
